explainChallenge: Explain the challenge you are facing, and we will provide guidance from the scriptures.
problemPlaceholder: For example: I'm feeling stressed in my career and don't know what to do...
problemInputLabel: Share your problem here. Explain the challenge you are facing.
errorOccurred: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.
noSolutionsFound: Sorry, no specific solutions were found for this problem. Please try rephrasing your question.
welcomeMessage: The challenges that arise in the journey of life come only to strengthen us. Share the burden on your mind with us. Drawing inspiration from the Puranas, epics, and the Bhagavad Gita of our Sanatana Dharma, we will help you find the right path for your problem.

guidedPathToPeace: A guided path to peace and clarity.

friendlyChatForGuidance: A friendly chat for quick guidance.

manoVakthaWelcome: Hello! I am Mano Vaktha, your personal wellness companion. How are you feeling today? You can tell me what's on your mind, or select a topic below to start.
stressDescription: Stress is our mind and body's natural response to perceived challenges or demands, a gentle signal to pause and find balance within.
noneApply: None of these apply to me
routinePlaceholder: e.g., work, study, exercise, sleep schedule...
disclaimer: Disclaimer: Mano Vaktha is an AI assistant and not a medical professional. For crises, please contact a healthcare provider.
anxietyDescription: Anxiety is your body's natural response to stress. It's a feeling of fear or apprehension about what's to come.
depressionDescription: Depression is more than just sadness. It's a mood disorder causing a persistent feeling of sadness and loss of interest.
burnoutDescription: Burnout is a state of emotional, physical, and mental exhaustion caused by excessive and prolonged stress.
cynicism: Cynicism or detachment from your job
procrastination: Procrastination and taking longer to get things done
quickChatWelcome: Greetings. I am Mano Vaktha. How may I assist you on your path today?
name: Name
videosForYourPath: Curated videos to support your path.
describeProblemInManuscript: Please describe your problem in the 'Manuscript' section first to see relevant videos.
noVideosFound: Could not find specific videos for your problem. You can still find general guidance in our other sections.
findSupport: Find the support and guidance you need.
noProfessionalsFound: Could not find any professionals at this time. Please try again later.
bookingConfirmationMessage: Your appointment with {0} on {1} at {2} has been successfully booked. A confirmation has been sent to your email.
reviewPastSessions: Review your past sessions and continue your journey.
journeyNotStarted: You have not started a wellness journey yet.
startOneInJourneyTab: You can begin one in the 'Wellness Journey' tab.
noManuscriptHistory: You have no past manuscript queries.
noSolutionsSaved: You haven't saved any solutions yet.
saveFromManuscript: You can save your favorite solutions from the 'Manuscript' section.
agreeResponsibility: I understand I am taking full responsibility for my actions based on the guidance provided.
agreeNotDepending: I acknowledge this is an AI companion and not a substitute for professional medical advice.
hereIsYourRoadmap: Here is the roadmap for your journey. Are you ready to begin?
confirmResetJourney: Are you sure you want to reset your journey? Your current progress will be lost.
confirmClearHistory: Are you sure you want to clear your entire manuscript history? This action cannot be undone.
journeyWelcome: Greetings. I am Mano Vaktha. Describe the problem you are facing, and we will create a personalized wellness journey for you.
accountDeletionWarning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.

confirmDeletionCheckbox: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
